title: acer monspessulanum subsp. ibericum
intro: Acer monspessulanum subsp. ibericum, also known as the Spanish field maple, is a subspecies of the field maple tree (Acer campestre) native to the Iberian Peninsula. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The health benefits of Acer monspessulanum subsp. ibericum include its ability to reduce oxidative stress and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the tree's leaves and bark can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote relaxation.
